summary: Run a strict reproduce, fix, and verify loop with acceptance checks tied to original bug criteria.

inputs.name: issue_context
inputs.description: Ticket, bug report, or failure context to triage.

inputs.name: reproduction_criteria
inputs.description: Observable criteria that define a valid reproduction.

inputs.name: verification_scope
inputs.description: Checks that must pass before closure.

outputs.name: reproduction_plan
outputs.description: Deterministic reproduction steps and expected failing behavior.

outputs.name: minimal_fix_diff
outputs.description: Smallest code or configuration change addressing root cause.

outputs.name: verification_checklist
outputs.description: Acceptance checks mapped directly to reproduction criteria.

workflow_steps: Define reproduction criteria before writing the fix.
Implement smallest plausible fix on root-cause path.
Run explicit verification checks tied to reproduction criteria.
Document closure evidence and residual risks.

verification.smoke_test: Run the cycle for one bug and verify the final output includes acceptance checks mapped to the original reproduction criteria.
